name: io.github.countersign-network/countersign
title: Countersign
description: Kill switch + spend guard for AI agents that spend money, across every wallet vendor at once.

environmentVariables.name: COUNTERSIGN_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Countersign Core to govern (hosted or self-hosted).

environmentVariables.name: COUNTERSIGN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the Core (self-serve one at https://app.countersign.network/start or POST /signup).

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.summary: Countersign is a neutral, cross-vendor control plane for AI agents that spend money. It holds one policy, one sub-second freeze (kill switch), and one tamper-evident audit ledger across multiple agent-wallet and card backends at once. Remote mode: set COUNTERSIGN_URL + COUNTERSIGN_API_KEY against a hosted or self-hosted Core. Testnet only; Countersign never takes custody of funds.
